title: Missing Number
description:
Given an array `nums` containing `n` distinct numbers in the range `[0, n]`,
return the only number in the range that is missing from the array.

solutions.summary: Store every value, then find the first index in `[0, n]` that is absent.

steps.title: Put the values in a set
steps.explanation: A set gives O(1) "is this number present?" checks.

steps.title: Find the first absent index
steps.explanation: Check every candidate from `0` to `n`; return the one missing from the set.
